full_text:
Shi Kuang 士匡
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Kuang (士匡). Acted as Lü Dai’s envoy and persuaded Shi Hui to surrender. He was still stripped of rank. Shi Kuang was affiliated with Shi Xie and the Wu Kingdom.
